ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the participant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the participant */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the participant enrolled in the study */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "household_size" INTEGER /* Number of people in the participant's household */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_code" TEXT /* Product code (e.g., CC, SC) */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "study_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the study the product is part of */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of air freshener (e.g., spray, gel, solid) */,
  "fragrance" TEXT /* Fragrance of the air freshener */,
  "active_ingredients" TEXT /* Active ingredients in the air freshener */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_records" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who used the product */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product used */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date the product was used */,
  "rooms_used" TEXT /* Rooms where the product was used (comma-separated list) */,
  "malodors_eliminated" TEXT /* Types of malodors the product was used to eliminate (comma-separated list) */,
  "reasons_used" TEXT /* Reasons for using the product (comma-separated list) */,
  "satisfaction_rating" TEXT /* Overall satisfaction rating of the product */,
  "residue_rating" TEXT /* Rating of whether the product left residues or wetness behind */,
  "trigger_difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty in pressing the trigger */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes the usage record received */,
  "comment_count" INTEGER /* Number of comments the usage record received */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the participant */,
  "participant_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participant submitted the usage record */,
  "researcher_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the researcher reviewed the usage record */,
  "utc_timestamp" TEXT /* UTC timestamp of the usage record */,
  "usage_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of product usage */,
  "usage_duration" TEXT /* Duration of product usage */,
  "odor_intensity" TEXT /* Intensity of the odor eliminated by the product */,
  "elimination_effectiveness" TEXT /* Effectiveness of the product in eliminating odors */,
  "product_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the product at the time of usage (e.g., full, half-full, almost empty) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_records_satisfaction_rating FOREIGN KEY ("satisfaction_rating") REFERENCES ratings ("rating_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_records_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_records_residue_rating FOREIGN KEY ("residue_rating") REFERENCES ratings ("rating_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_records_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_records_trigger_difficulty FOREIGN KEY ("trigger_difficulty") REFERENCES ratings ("rating_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "rooms" (
  "room_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each room */,
  "room_name" TEXT /* Name of the room (e.g., Bathroom - Half Bath, Kitchen) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the room */,
  "room_category" TEXT /* Category of the room (e.g., bathroom, kitchen, living room) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("room_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "malodors" (
  "malodor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of malodor */,
  "malodor_name" TEXT /* Name of the malodor (e.g., Bathroom/Toilet, Greasy/Fried Food Smell) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the malodor */,
  "malodor_category" TEXT /* Category of the malodor (e.g., organic, chemical, food-related) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("malodor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reasons" (
  "reason_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reason */,
  "reason_name" TEXT /* Name of the reason (e.g., To eliminate odors in the air, To eliminate odors on fabrics) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reason */,
  "reason_category" TEXT /* Category of the reason (e.g., personal, family, pets) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reason_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "rating_name" TEXT /* Name of the rating (e.g., Very satisfied, Agree) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rating */,
  "rating_category" TEXT /* Category of the rating (e.g., satisfaction, effectiveness, ease of use) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id")
)
